blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,499 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
